mnemonics: PACT-TURN: CPU Utilization, Throughput, Turnaround time, Waiting time, Response time
keyPoints: CPU Utilization: Keep the CPU as busy as possible.
Throughput: Number of processes completed per time unit.
Turnaround Time: Total time from submission to completion.
Waiting Time: Amount of time a process spends waiting in the ready queue.
Response Time: Time from submission until first response.
commonMistakes: Assuming a higher scheduling priority always leads to better overall performance.
Focusing on optimizing one criterion (e.g., response time) at the severe expense of another (e.g., throughput).
Confusing turnaround time (total duration) with response time (time to first output).
